title: pentaglottis sempervirens
intro: Pentaglottis sempervirens, also known as alkanet or bugloss, is a perennial plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pentaglottis sempervirens include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antiviral effects. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
